item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Incredible hand embroidery by Japanese artist Narumi Takada
item.description:
What are we looking at? Foot and paw prints on snow, obviously, but.. it is stitched by hand? This is EMBROIDERY???
This in-progress pic clears it up a bit but the end piece is still bafflingly incredible Narumi Takada: Stepping on Fresh Snow
item.dc:creator: insanitycontinuum

King missile
Cake.

I really like Static-X
PowerGlove
Heilung
Tom Cardy
Little Big
Squirrel Nut Zippers
Rings of Saturn
Nekrogobkinkon
The Roddenberries
Magic sword
Create feature
PsychoStickk That's are just some of the bands I like. I can go from black metal to classical. Synthetic to jazz. So if you drive with me be prepared for my music to be as unhinged as my post.

item.dc:creator: KalliJ

item.title: Stop Believing Clickbait Headlines
item.description: So, this story and others like it have been popping up on Imgur over the last day. And it bothers me that so many people are taking the headline and the photos from this and other stories about this family literally. And that bothers me, because the MAGA world thrives on using clickbait propaganda headlines to feed lies to its believers. I'm not defending this family in the slightest. They own too much water (though if you know anything about farming it takes a ton of water) compared to other farmers. It's the headline I'm railing against. Here is an misleading line from this specific article: "Urban water systems are desperate for water, but in 2023 they’ll receive just 5% of what they requested from the state. Stewart and Lydia Resnick use 150 billion gallons a year." You not the use of "receive just 5% of what they requested" vs "use 150 billion gallons a year". That is purposeful, to make you think that urban water systems are getting something while the Resnick's are getting a ton more. But 5% isn't specified as an amount (not to mention there are many urban water systems in California so it is possible they could get less than 150B gallons, but they may not actually request that much either). But the fact is that the water these people own (and in reality only own 56% of it), is only part of the Kern Water Bank. A collection of water in Kern County. This article claims that all of this Water Bank was divided up and sold to private companies, but that is not true either. Some of the ownership is by public works companies. But in any case. ONE PLACE'S WATER. The Bank is primarily used to supplement rain water. Yes, due to it being California and droughts being more common, there is more a need for this water. But in a rainy year, excess refills this. And yes, there are problems with them and other private companies owning excess water storage. But I'll say it again. ONE PLACE'S WATER. California is a HUGE state. SoCal doesn't get water from here. NoCal doesn't get water from here. Kern County gets water from here. This family doesn't own anywhere near ALL of California's public water system. This will die because it doesn't fit the normal Imgur community narrative but we should be acting like the MAGA folks. tl;dr Headline is false. They own 56% of one county's excess water collection.
item.dc:creator: makesense

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1239 (open range)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
This meme is terrifyingly accurate for my current mood.
I feel like this is the weird sort of shit I would pull with a partner for wedding invites.
I used to love night drives. Not so much anymore.
Radio silence, what a surprise.
If I misgender or mispronoun you, please correct me.
This baby vulture looks like it just achieved enlightenment under a bodhi tree.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Good boy Pippin [Kissing noises] [evil Conure laughter] Pippin. Pippin Pippin. Pippin. Pippin. Pippin! Pippin? It's okay Pippin."
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Applied to Five Jobs Today!
item.description:
I struggle at job hunting. My neurodivergence is not designed for the algorithm. But I made myself sit down today and focus on finding work. So I got that going for me.
Cat tax: Meow!

item.title: A picture from a vetted source
item.description: This is a 100% real picture of Mark Zuckerberg. It has been vetted, and verified by *me*.In accordance with Facebook and meta's new terms, the continued subject of the faculty of this photo is moot /s *A former United States military intelligence analyst*. FP edit If you would like to help out this disabled Secret Squirrel follow this link. https://www.gofundme.com/f/Help-crush-ptsd

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Friday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
AP can do anything she wants.. greetings online friends
better head to Vegas
most bugs are pretty cool
not even sure what he's eating. looks like a nerds rope with tiny pills instead of nerds
sometimes i steal something bc of how dumb it is
breakfast of champions
mmm hmm
i would die for mable
wait what
yes
your guess is as good as mine
me. your boy celeryman would
too bad. only need 7.5 billion
this messed with me for a while
ok
as a treat
legend
that's my set.. have a great weekend gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Dumperoo
item.description:
Yes. They don’t care about kids.
One of the best of her game outfits. (Go Chiefs!)
I love the Sex Pistols. I love when they get made fun of more.
That’s a good sister.
I will stop doing a lot of things for the right price.
The girls, gays, theys, and Coleman <3
People who side with Gaston are not to be trusted. The movie can be taken as an allegory for AIDS and he’s the one dehumanizing the man with AIDS. (Howard Ashman’s family insists it is not about AIDS. I argue otherwise)
God’s favorite princess, Shart.
What if one of the world’s tallest twins spawned outside your bedroom door? (Best jump in that movie)
If anyone this hot approached me I’d absolutely let them buy me a drink.
My bff is an extraction baby so I like to hoard memes about it.
You are doing great. There’s no real timeline.
Well, yeah. Cops think acorns are exceptionally sneaky so…
i’m baby
item.dc:creator: clevergrrl420

item.title: Cop Show Tropes That Make Me Yell At My TV: A Rant
item.description:
When they have the suspect at gunpoint - usually because the suspect is armed and holding someone hostage - and one of the cops holds up one hand like they're trying to calm a spooked horse, while putting their gun away, so they can talk the suspect out of hurting anybody. (Criminal Minds is the BIGGEST offender in this category.) Has me yelling, "THAT WOULD NEVER HAPPEN!!"
The Fuckup Family Member Trope -This one doesn't make me yell as much, but it still irks me. In 90% of cop shows, if a family member shows up, they're probably a fuckup of some sort. Example: Amanda Rollins' sister in Law & Order: SVU is such an irredeemable fuckup, that it's annoying to watch.
Literally EVERYTHING about CSI makes me yell at my TV. I really just can't with this fuckin' show. "WHY ARE YOU INTERROGATING PEOPLE?? YOU'RE A CRIME SCENE TECH!!"
"WHO GAVE YOU A FUCKING GUN?? DID YOU JUST SHOOT SOMEBODY??"
"WHY ARE YOU CHASING PEOPLE?? YOU'RE SUPPOSED TO BE IN THE LAB!!" Thank you for coming to my TED Talk.
item.dc:creator: ButtersTheCat

item.title: HILARIOUS FRIDAY MEME DUMP #381
item.description:
1. So apparently they mixed dino DNA with chicken and boy DNA!
2. How to know if she is a keeper? THIS IS HOW:
3. MMMMMMM CLAY TABLETS
4. HAS ENGINEERING GONE TOO FAR?
5
6. DO IT YOU COWARRD!
7
8. DOPE
9. I like how the kid powered up
10
11. JCVD
12. That time we all wen to a RAVE PARTY
13
15. And here is the new ducky model in the game I'm making. It has a cute new tie with a heart. The goal here is to make the player care for it? Do you think it will work? P.S. If you want to support me, a wishlist of my current game will mean the world to me: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Dont_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse_The_Game/ But please don't spend money on my previous games, I recognize that they aren't that good I don't want to burden anyone financially with them (I loved every minute of making them, but I was still a noob back then). I make frequent giveaways and you can get them for free :) Have an amazing weekedn everyone
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Chasing social media likes is a mental disorder
item.description: Link to sauce: https://www.wingsmagazine.com/canadian-plane-fighting-l-a-fires-out-of-service-after-colliding-with-civilian-drone/ And it goes without saying that if your response to thousands of people losing their homes is to "take some sick drone footage of it" please do everyone a favor and opt out of living for everyone else's sake.
